[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: lightning. And the leader of the group which I was supposed to lead got killed. And many were hurt. I didn't go back to work. I went to the next train back to the mountains. And I helped in the rescues naturally. But even in the camps, I was always in care of the ambulance. I was a doctor in the camps.
